collection_name: Consolidated Financial Statements for Holding Companies
filer: Top-tier BHCs, SLHCs, IHCs and SHCs with total consolidated assets of $3 billion or more
notes: Most detailed FR Y-9 report; 22 schedules. BHCK is the consolidated prefix (BHDM = domestic only)

collection_name: Parent Company Only Financial Statements for Large Holding Companies
filer: Parent of each top-tier holding company that files the FR Y-9C (one per Y-9C filer per tier)
notes: Parent-only (unconsolidated); 5 schedules (PI, PI-A, PC, PC-A, PC-B)

collection_name: Parent Company Only Financial Statements for Small Holding Companies
filer: Top-tier domestic BHCs, SLHCs and SHCs with total consolidated assets of less than $3 billion
notes: As of Jun 30 and Dec 31; 4 sections (Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Memoranda, Notes)

collection_name: Financial Statements for Employee Stock Ownership Plan Holding Companies
filer: All ESOP bank holding companies and ESOP savings-and-loan holding companies
notes: As of Dec 31; 4 sections. Any size cutoff UNVERIFIED

collection_name: Supplement to the Consolidated Financial Statements for Holding Companies
filer: Domestic BHCs, SLHCs, IHCs and SHCs filing the FR Y-9C or FR Y-9SP, as designated when activated
notes: Flexible supplement; no permanent lettered schedule structure (UNVERIFIED per as-of date)

collection_name: Consolidated Reports of Condition and Income (banks with domestic and foreign offices)
filer: Banks of any size with a foreign office; also domestic-only advanced-approaches banks or banks with total assets of $100 billion or more
notes: The Call Report; most detailed of the three forms; carries foreign-office schedules RC-H, RC-I, RI-D

collection_name: Consolidated Reports of Condition and Income (banks with domestic offices only)
filer: Banks with domestic offices only and total consolidated assets of less than $100 billion that are not advanced-approaches institutions
notes: Same schedule set as the 031 except foreign-office schedules RC-H, RC-I, RI-D

collection_name: Consolidated Reports of Condition and Income (streamlined report for small domestic banks)
filer: Banks with domestic offices only and total assets of less than $5 billion (excluding advanced-approaches/Category III and large/highly-complex assessment filers)
notes: Streamlined; adds Schedule SU; omits RC-A, RC-D, RC-H, RC-I, RC-P, RC-Q, RC-S, RC-V, RI-D

collection_name: Report of Assets and Liabilities of U.S. Branches and Agencies of Foreign Banks
filer: All US branches and agencies of foreign (and Puerto Rican) banks, federally or state licensed, insured or uninsured, including their IBFs
notes: Collects no income data; Schedule RAL plus supporting schedules

collection_name: Report of Assets and Liabilities of a Non-U.S. Branch Managed or Controlled by a U.S. Branch or Agency of a Foreign Bank
filer: Any US branch/agency filing the FFIEC 002 that manages or controls one or more non-US branches of its parent bank
notes: Supplement to the FFIEC 002; one per managed/controlled office

collection_name: Country Exposure Report
filer: US commercial banks, savings associations, bank/SLHC and IHCs with $30 million or more in total claims on residents of foreign countries
notes: Confidential; immediate-counterparty and ultimate-risk bases

collection_name: Country Exposure Information Report
filer: Same filers as FFIEC 009 with material foreign-country exposures (over 1% of assets or 20% of capital)
notes: Public supplement to the FFIEC 009

collection_name: Regulatory Capital Reporting for Institutions Subject to the Advanced Capital Adequacy Framework
filer: Banks, savings associations, BHCs and SLHCs subject to the Advanced Capital Adequacy Framework (generally >= $250B assets or >= $10B foreign exposure) plus their depository subsidiaries
notes: Schedules A-S (19); A-IRB RWA, SLR, operational risk (AMA)

collection_name: Market Risk Regulatory Report for Institutions Subject to the Market Risk Capital Rule
filer: Banks/BHCs/SLHCs subject to the market-risk capital rule (generally trading assets+liabilities >= $1B or >= 10% of total assets)
notes: Single schedule organized into reporting sections; feeds market-risk RWA

collection_name: Annual Report of Foreign Banking Organizations
filer: Each FBO engaged in banking in the US through a subsidiary bank, Edge/agreement corporation, commercial-lending company, or its own branches/agencies
notes: Packet of reportable items (financial statements, organization, shares, Reg K eligibility); older facsimiles carried 7100-0297

collection_name: Financial Statements of U.S. Nonbank Subsidiaries Held by Foreign Banking Organizations
filer: FBOs, per US nonbank subsidiary, by asset-size thresholds
notes: Uses the same schedule set as the FR Y-11

collection_name: Abbreviated Financial Statements of U.S. Nonbank Subsidiaries Held by Foreign Banking Organizations
filer: FBOs with US nonbank subsidiaries of assets $250M-$500M
notes: Abbreviated version collecting only four summary financial items

collection_name: Capital and Asset Report for Foreign Banking Organizations
filer: All FBOs with US banking operations
notes: Consolidated capital/asset data items; no lettered schedules

collection_name: Report of Changes in Organizational Structure
filer: Top-tier BHCs/FHCs, top-tier SLHCs, state member banks not controlled by a BHC/FBO, Edge and agreement corporations, FBOs, and SHCs
notes: Routes each reportable event to one of eight schedules

collection_name: Financial Statements of U.S. Nonbank Subsidiaries of U.S. Holding Companies
filer: Top-tier holding companies, per nonbank subsidiary, by thresholds
notes: Legacy 7100-0073 now covers the FR Y-7N family

collection_name: Abbreviated Financial Statements of U.S. Nonbank Subsidiaries of U.S. Holding Companies
filer: Top-tier holding companies with nonbank subsidiaries of assets $250M-$500M below quarterly criteria
notes: Collects only four summary financial items (no schedules)

collection_name: Consolidated Holding Company Report of Equity Investments in Nonfinancial Companies
filer: Top-tier domestic holding companies that file the FR Y-9C or FR Y-9SP and meet the investment-size thresholds
notes: 4 schedules (Type of Investments, Type of Security, Type of Entity, Transactions)

collection_name: Annual Report of Merchant Banking Investments Held for an Extended Period
filer: Financial holding companies holding nonfinancial merchant-banking investments beyond the routine holding period
notes: Single investment-detail schedule; no lettered sub-schedules

collection_name: Annual Report of Holding Companies
filer: All top-tier holding companies (BHCs, SLHCs, SHCs; certain ESOPs; non-QFBO foreign organizations)
notes: Narrative/event-based; org chart, branch verification, ownership/insider info; no lettered schedules

collection_name: The Bank Holding Company Report of Insured Depository Institutions' Section 23A Transactions
filer: All top-tier US BHCs (incl. FHCs and IHCs), all SLHCs, and all FBOs that directly own a US subsidiary bank
notes: One report per insured depository institution; Section 23A / Regulation W; no lettered schedules

collection_name: Capital Assessments and Stress Testing Report - Annual
filer: US BHCs, IHCs of foreign banking organizations, and covered SLHCs with total consolidated assets of $100 billion or more
notes: CCAR/DFAST; Schedules A-F (Summary, Macro Scenario, RCI, Regulatory Capital, Operational Risk, Business Plan Changes)

collection_name: Capital Assessments and Stress Testing Report - Quarterly
filer: US BHCs, IHCs, covered SLHCs with $100 billion or more in total consolidated assets
notes: Schedules A-M (letter I not used); position-/loan-level stress-test inputs

collection_name: Capital Assessments and Stress Testing Report - Monthly
filer: US BHCs, IHCs, covered SLHCs with $100 billion or more in total consolidated assets that hold the relevant portfolios
notes: Loan-/account-level mortgage, home-equity and credit-card portfolios; Schedules A-D

collection_name: Banking Organization Systemic Risk Report
filer: US BHCs and covered SLHCs >= $100B; FBOs with combined US assets >= $100B; and US firms designated as G-SIBs
notes: G-SIB indicators; Schedules A-G across six systemic categories

collection_name: Complex Institution Liquidity Monitoring Report
filer: Large banking organizations subject to LCR/NSFR - primarily Category I-III firms
notes: Granular liquidity data by product x counterparty x maturity x collateral; product tables under Inflows/Outflows/Supplemental

collection_name: Report of Transaction Accounts, Other Deposits, and Vault Cash
filer: Depository institutions (commercial banks, savings institutions, credit unions, US branches/agencies of foreign banks) under Regulation D
notes: Source for monetary aggregates and required reserves; no lettered schedules

collection_name: Basel III Public Disclosure Templates and Tables
regulator: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision (BIS); US disclosures via FFIEC 101/102 and the market-risk rule
filer: Internationally large/advanced banks; in the US, advanced-approaches and market-risk-rule institutions
notes: International standard (BCBS d455 / DIS module); tables (A suffix) qualitative, templates quantitative

collection_name: Statistics on Depository Institutions
filer: All FDIC-insured commercial banks and savings institutions (sourced from their Call Reports)
notes: Public presentation layer over Call Report/TFR data; FDIC analog of the FFIEC UBPR; API at https://api.fdic.gov/banks/financials

collection_name: Summary of Deposits
regulator: Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (jointly with OCC for the survey)
filer: All FDIC-insured institutions with branch offices, including insured US branches of foreign banks
notes: Branch/office-level deposit totals; 70,000+ offices; API at https://api.fdic.gov/banks/sod

collection_name: Failures and Assistance Transactions (Research Information System / RIS)
filer: Failed and FDIC-assisted institutions (records back to the 1930s)
notes: ~4,100+ failure/assistance records; API at https://api.fdic.gov/banks/failures

collection_name: NCUA 5300 Call Report (Credit Unions) and Profile (FS220A)
filer: All federally insured credit unions (FICUs)
notes: Credit-union analog of the bank Call Report; account-code (Acct/FS220) system; Profile is the FS220A family

collection_name: OCC Historical National Bank Reports (Annual Report of the Comptroller of the Currency)
regulator: Office of the Comptroller of the Currency
filer: National banks (federally chartered commercial banks) via periodic Reports of Condition, 1863-1941
notes: Primary historical bank-level data source 1863-1941; Annual Report on FRASER; field schema varies by era (UNVERIFIED single schema)

collection_name: Uniform Bank Performance Report
filer: All banks - items are computed/derived from each bank's Call Report (FFIEC 031/041/051), not directly filed
notes: Derived ratios vs peer-group average and percentile rank; UBPR#### codes

collection_name: National Information Center / NPW Institutional-Structure Bulk Data
filer: All entities the Fed tracks: banks, BHCs/FHCs, branches, savings institutions, holding-company tiers, some foreign and non-bank entities
notes: Canonical RSSD crosswalk hub; CSV bulk files (Attributes Active/Closed/Branches, Relationships, Transformations); exact refresh interval UNVERIFIED

collection_name: SEC EDGAR (bank holding company filings)
filer: Public bank holding companies and other registrants (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, DEF 14A, XBRL)
notes: REST APIs on data.sec.gov; no official CIK<->RSSD crosswalk published (UNVERIFIED)

collection_name: Home Mortgage Disclosure Act Loan/Application Register (LAR)
filer: Covered depository institutions (banks, savings associations, credit unions) and non-depository mortgage lenders meeting coverage tests
primary_identifier: LEI (2018-forward; pre-2018 Agency Code + Respondent ID)
notes: Loan-level mortgage data; companion Transmittal Sheet/Panel; thresholds vary by year

collection_name: Micro Data Reference Manual
filer: Meta-dictionary - defines the coded variables used across (nearly) every Fed/FFIEC reporting form
notes: Master data dictionary; downloadable MDRM.zip (MDRM_CSV.csv); ~87,000 codes cited (UNVERIFIED)
